tier_definitions.core: Language core (jerboa prelude, reader, core macros). Never breaks.
tier_definitions.stable: Curated stdlib (std io, std text, std net, ...). SemVer.
tier_definitions.compat: Compatibility shims for other Schemes (Gambit, Clojure, SRFI). Stable but import-gated.
tier_definitions.unstable: Experimental or vendor-specific (wasm, dev, lsp, thunderchez). May churn.
